creator: timur@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to MMacD from comment #0)
Well, it's not really related to Samba itself. Pkg system isn't flexible enough to express such generic dependencies(yet).

But I believe you can enforce removing any package with dependencies without recursively removing them.

pkg-delete

     -f, --force
                Forces packages to be removed despite leaving unresolved
                dependencies.  In combination with the -a or --all flag,
                causes pkg(8) to be removed as well as all other packages.
